package rulecoverage

// Negative scenario for mixed_receiver_kinds: shows the preferred shape for this rule.
// Rule intent: Methods on the same receiver type mix pointer and value receivers.
type NegativeMixedReceiverKindsUser struct {
    ID string `json:"id" db:"id"`
}

func (u *NegativeMixedReceiverKindsUser) IDValue() string { return u.ID }
func (u *NegativeMixedReceiverKindsUser) Rename(id string) { u.ID = id }
